property_address: Flat 123, Sample street, Sample city, AB1 CD3

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: The balcony appears modern and in generally good decorative order, with grey composite decking and black metal balustrading. The surfaces visible are broadly clean and well kept, with only light outdoor exposure wear apparent; no significant damage is visible in the photographs. The balcony is unfurnished and free from loose contents apart from small fixed fittings on the deck surface.

items.name: Ceiling/overhead balcony soffit
items.description: External ceiling/soffit area to balcony opening, painted light cream/white.

items.name: Walls/external elevations
items.description: External wall surfaces to balcony, smooth rendered finish painted light cream/white.

items.name: Balcony door
items.description: Full-height glazed sliding/folding balcony door with dark metal frame.

items.name: Balcony flooring
items.description: Grey composite deck boards laid lengthways to balcony floor.

items.name: Balustrade/guard rail
items.description: Black painted metal balcony balustrade with vertical bars and square top rail.

items.name: Balcony privacy screen
items.description: Dark vertical privacy screen/panel at one end of the balcony opening.

items.name: Deck surface fittings
items.description: Two small circular fixed deck fittings/caps visible on the composite flooring.

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: A high-spec modern bathroom presented in very clean decorative order overall, with a minimalist contemporary finish throughout. The room features extensive polished dark marble-effect tiled surfaces, glossy white wall tiles, mirrored storage, and integrated lighting, giving a bright and premium appearance. No significant damage is visible in the supplied photos, although light marking is apparent on some glossy surfaces and the toilet brush set and tissue pack are present in the room.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white painted ceiling with recessed downlights and circular ventilation outlet.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Large-format glossy white wall tiles to most walls, with dark marble-effect feature tiling/panel sections and mirrored surfaces to vanity and storage areas.

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Large-format dark marble-effect polished floor tiles.

items.name: Door
items.description: Painted white internal door with brushed dark metal lever handle and round escutcheon. Adjacent second narrow door/panel visible at right in some views.

items.name: Glass bath screen
items.description: Fixed clear glass bath shower screen with chrome support/hinge fittings.

items.name: Bathtub
items.description: White rectangular bath with integrated overflow and waste fittings.

items.name: Bath taps and controls
items.description: Chrome bath filler and twin control knobs mounted on wall above bath.

items.name: Handheld shower set
items.description: Chrome handheld shower head with hose and wall-mounted holder/rail.

items.name: Rain shower / shower fitting
items.description: Wall-mounted shower fitting visible in the shower area, chrome finish.

items.name: Wash basin
items.description: Integrated white rectangular vanity basin set into a floating white vanity unit, with chrome mixer tap.

items.name: Floating vanity unit
items.description: Modern white floating vanity with integrated basin and drawer front, gloss finish.
defects: Light surface marking/spotting visible on top surface in close-up

items.name: Mirror cabinet
items.description: Large mirrored cabinet above the basin with side-hinged doors and integrated lighting.

items.name: Shelving unit
items.description: Built-in wood-effect shelving/storage unit with mirrored side returns and internal LED lighting.

items.name: Heated towel rail
items.description: Chrome ladder-style heated towel rail mounted to wall.

items.name: Toilet
items.description: White contemporary close-coupled toilet with concealed cistern/button flush arrangement and matching white seat/lid.

items.description: Small black and white checkerboard bath mat.

items.name: Mirror
items.description: Large full-height mirror surface adjacent to vanity and storage areas.

items.name: Ventilation outlet
items.description: Circular ceiling ventilation outlet / extractor grille.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: A compact, contemporary bedroom presented in generally clean and tidy decorative order. The room appears freshly decorated with white emulsioned walls and ceiling, light carpet and matching white woodwork, with furnishings in good overall condition. Minor visible marks are present to a few walls, the mattress surface and one blind pull, but no significant damage is evident in the photographs.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white ceiling with recessed downlight(s).

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned white walls throughout the bedroom.
defects: Light scuff mark to wall above skirting behind the bed, near the radiator area
Visible curved scuff/mark to wall section low down above skirting near the corner beside the door
Small brown mark to wall above the right-hand side of the headboard
Faint marks to wall above the headboard and near the bedside area

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards.
defects: Minor marking to skirting at floor level near the radiator

items.description: White painted hinged internal door with black lever handle and chrome hinges.

items.description: White-framed casement window with sill, city view beyond.

items.description: Plain light-coloured roller blind fitted to the window.

defects: One toggle/pull end appears frayed or loose

items.description: Two white bedside tables with faceted drawer fronts and gold-tone handles/legs.

items.description: Two matching table lamps with pale rectangular shades and black metal bases.

items.description: White chest of drawers with faceted drawer fronts and gold-tone handles, on slender legs.

items.name: Portable oil-filled radiator
items.description: Black portable electric oil-filled radiator on castors with power cable.

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: Modern entrance hall presented in generally good decorative order and appears clean overall. Walls, ceiling and joinery are freshly finished with only light cosmetic marks visible in a few places. Flooring and doors are in good sound condition, with the hallway appearing tidy and uncluttered aside from a small brochure/card left on the floor by the entrance.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Flat ceiling finished in smooth white emulsion with recessed downlights and a ceiling-mounted smoke detector visible in the hall.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned white walls throughout the entrance hall.
defects: Light scuff marks and faint pencil-like marks visible on wall surfaces, notably on the wall in photos P061-P063 and P068-P071
Minor marking on the wall adjacent to the entry area in photo P072

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards to the perimeter of the hall.

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring laid throughout the entrance hall.
defects: Small dark mark visible on flooring near the left side of the hall in photo P082

items.name: Internal door
items.description: Woodgrain internal door with white frame and brass-coloured handle/lock furniture.

items.name: Electrical socket / outlet plate
items.description: Brushed metal socket plate with multiple outlets and USB points visible on the hall wall.

items.name: Wall switch panel
items.description: Brushed metal multi-gang light switch plate fitted to the hall wall.

items.name: Wall-mounted control panel
items.description: Black-framed digital control panel mounted to the hall wall, likely for heating/security/building controls.

items.name: Built-in wardrobe / storage cupboard
items.description: Built-in hallway storage with wood-effect shelf and hanging rail, white interior, accessed via hinged door.

defects: Protective tape/label residue visible around one handle in photo P075

items.name: Smoke detector
items.description: White ceiling-mounted smoke detector visible in the hallway ceiling.

items.description: Small printed brochure/card lying on the floor by the entrance threshold.

items.name: Threshold strip / floor transition
items.description: Marble-effect threshold strip at the entrance doorway transitioning between flooring finishes.

items.name: Carpeted area beyond hall
items.description: Beige patterned carpet visible beyond the entrance threshold/doorway.

items.name: Hanging light fitting / ceiling downlights
items.description: Recessed ceiling downlights providing illumination in the hall.

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: A contemporary furnished reception and open-plan kitchen presented in very good decorative order overall, with a clean, high-spec finish and matching modern furnishings and integrated appliances. The room appears tidy and well maintained, with only light wear visible to a small number of soft furnishings and minor marks to the walls and door edge. Windows, blinds, flooring and kitchen installations are generally in excellent serviceable condition as evidenced by the photos.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white painted ceiling with recessed downlights, smoke alarm and ceiling-mounted air grille/vent visible.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned light magnolia walls throughout the reception and kitchen area.
defects: Minor faint marks visible to wall surfaces in places, including small scuffs/marks near the open shelving/kitchen area and on the wall beside the utility access door.

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards to perimeter.
defects: Light cosmetic marking visible at some corners and junctions.

items.name: Internal door
items.description: White painted internal access door with black lever handle, leading to utility/plant cupboard.
defects: Paint chip and scuffing to the latch side edge near the lock/strike plate.
Minor marking to the door face near the lower section.

items.name: Window
items.description: White uPVC double-glazed windows/doors with black gasket detailing and grey external balcony/railing outlook.

items.name: Roller blind
items.description: Light-coloured roller blind fitted above the main window/door openings.

items.name: Timber-effect flooring
items.description: Wide-plank oak-effect laminate/engineered-style flooring in a pale natural wood tone throughout the room.
defects: Minor light surface scuffs and isolated dark marks visible in several planks, particularly near the seating and dining areas.

items.name: Pendant light fittings
items.description: Three decorative exposed bulb pendant lights with dark suspension cords and brass-toned caps above the island/dining area.

defects: Noticeable dark marking/staining to the right-hand seat/arm area, particularly on the right arm and front-right seat cushion.
General worn/creased appearance consistent with use.

rooms.name: Walk In Wardrobe
rooms.summary: The walk-in wardrobe appears newly decorated and generally in very good order, with clean white walls/doors, light grey carpet and a modern fitted wardrobe arrangement. Overall presentation is tidy and uncluttered, with only minor cosmetic marks visible on the wall and door edge in close-up images. No significant damage is visible in the room photos.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white ceiling with recessed downlight positions visible; no fittings shown in operation.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned white walls throughout the wardrobe area.
defects: Light scuffing/abrasion visible on wall surface in close-up, mid-height area
Small faint mark/spotting visible on wall section by door

items.description: White painted skirting boards around the room perimeter.
